ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who posted the job */,
  "posting_date" TEXT /* Date the job was posted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the job belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Expected salary range */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., temporary, permanent) */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applications */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the client */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., regular, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Name of the worker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the worker */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the worker */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the worker */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the worker */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the worker */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills of the worker */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the worker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job assignment */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job assigned */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the job was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate for the assignment */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., hourly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_assignments_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_assignments_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_tracking" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time entry */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job assignment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the time was worked */,
  "hours_worked" REAL /* Number of hours worked */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of work */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of work */,
  "break_duration" REAL /* Duration of breaks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_tracking_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES job_assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll entry */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date the payroll was processed */,
  "gross_pay" REAL /* Gross pay for the worker */,
  "net_pay" REAL /* Net pay for the worker */,
  "tax_deducted" REAL /* Amount of tax deducted */,
  "benefits" REAL /* Value of benefits provided */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service provided */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance entry */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worker or vendor */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor (if applicable) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance information was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance document */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the compliance document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., job report, payroll report) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
